narrative:
Wilkesville Township has 533 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
